untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of dynamic support/resistance levels with precise rejection pattern characterization. The source text is incomplete/corrupted, and rejection distance percentage, bars-to-form-rejection count, volume multiplier thresholds, and max wick extension percentage are all marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] without specified values. Pivot levels (s1, r1) used as proxy for S/R, but true support/resistance detection and sharp rejection validation cannot be fully encoded without access to level identification algorithm and specific parameter values.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot points (s1/r1) as support/resistance proxies. Entry triggered by price reversal away from level (close beyond pivot) combined with significant body formation (body > atr_14) and elevated volume (vol_ratio_20 > 1.5) as rejection indicators. Exit on price return to level. Without specific threshold parameters and source text corruption, this is a partial interpretation only. Signal direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as rejection direction depends on which level (support vs resistance) triggers the pattern.
